languages.original_text: "Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"

languages.text: "Дознаватель ван Калокс, я хотел бы побеседовать с вами об... увиденном на Кьяве Гамма. Как бы вы охарактеризовали сей чудовищный образец еретической машинерии?"
"Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"
languages.original_text: "Дознаватель ван Калокс, я хотел бы побеседовать с вами об... увиденном на Кьяве Гамма. Как бы вы охарактеризовали сей чудовищный образец еретической машинерии?"

"Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"
"Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"

languages.text: «Interrogador van Calox, me gustaría hablar de... lo que vi en Kiava Gamma. ¿Cómo caracterizaría ese monstruoso ejemplo de maquinaria hereje?».
languages.original_text: "Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"

traits.locale_text: «Interrogador van Calox, me gustaría hablar de... lo que vi en Kiava Gamma. ¿Cómo caracterizaría ese monstruoso ejemplo de maquinaria hereje?».

languages.text: 「インテロゲイター・ヴァン・カロックス、あなたとお話ししたいことがあるのです……キアヴァ・ガンマで私が目にしたものについて。あの異端の機械装置の怪物じみた一例を、あなたならどう評されますか？」
languages.original_text: "Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"

traits.locale_text: 「インテロゲイター・ヴァン・カロックス、あなたとお話ししたいことがあるのです……キアヴァ・ガンマで私が目にしたものについて。あの異端の機械装置の怪物じみた一例を、あなたならどう評されますか？」

languages.text: “冯·卡洛克斯审讯官，我想和你谈谈……我在基亚瓦伽马星的见闻。你会如何定义那个异端机械怪物？”
languages.original_text: "Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"

traits.locale_text: “冯·卡洛克斯审讯官，我想和你谈谈……我在基亚瓦伽马星的见闻。你会如何定义那个异端机械怪物？”

languages.text: "Interrogator van Calox, ich möchte über etwas mit Euch sprechen ... das ich auf Kiava Gamma gesehen habe. Wie würdet Ihr dieses monströse Beispiel einer ketzerischen Maschinerie charakterisieren?"
languages.original_text: "Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"

traits.locale_text: "Interrogator van Calox, ich möchte über etwas mit Euch sprechen ... das ich auf Kiava Gamma gesehen habe. Wie würdet Ihr dieses monströse Beispiel einer ketzerischen Maschinerie charakterisieren?"

languages.text: « Interrogateur van Calox, j'aimerais vous parler au sujet de ce que j'ai vu sur Kiava Gamma. Comment qualifieriez-vous cet exemple monstrueux de machinerie hérétique ? »
languages.original_text: "Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"

traits.locale_text: « Interrogateur van Calox, j'aimerais vous parler au sujet de ce que j'ai vu sur Kiava Gamma. Comment qualifieriez-vous cet exemple monstrueux de machinerie hérétique ? »

languages.text: "Sorgucu van Calox, sizinle Kiava Gama'da gördüklerim... Hakkında konuşmak istiyorum. Kâfir makinenin o korkunç örneğini nasıl nitelendirirsiniz?"
languages.original_text: "Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"

traits.locale_text: "Sorgucu van Calox, sizinle Kiava Gama'da gördüklerim... Hakkında konuşmak istiyorum. Kâfir makinenin o korkunç örneğini nasıl nitelendirirsiniz?"
